docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: Flowcharts
docs.text:
graph LR
  A[Start] --> B{Failure?};
  B -->|Yes| C[Investigate...];
  C --> D[Debug];
  D --> B;
  B ---->|No| E[Success!];

docs.title: Sequence Diagrams
docs.text:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Server->>Terminal: Send request
  loop Health
      Terminal->>Terminal: Check for health
  end
  Note right of Terminal: System online
  Terminal-->>Server: Everything is OK
  Terminal->>Database: Request customer data
  Database-->>Terminal: Customer data

docs.title: With caption
docs.text:
The align attribute doesn't allow for centered alignment, which is why this option is not supported by Material for MkDocs.1 Instead, the image captions syntax can be used, as captions are optional.

Image caption

docs.title: With asset path
docs.text: Note: MkDocs treats the docs/ folder as the root. For an image located at docs/assets/images/example.png, use the path assets/images/example.png.

docs.title: Inline block syntex
docs.text: The homomorphism \(f\) is injective if and only if its kernel is only the singleton set \(e_G\), because otherwise \(\exists a,b\in G\) with \(a\neq b\) such that \(f(a)=f(b)\).

docs.title: Use case 1
docs.text:
Text can be deleted and replacement text added. This can also be combined into onea single operation. Highlighting is also possible and comments can be added inline.

Formatting can also be applied to blocks by putting the opening and closing tags on separate lines and adding new lines between the tags and the content.

docs.title: Use case 2
docs.text:
• This was marked (highlight)
  • This was inserted (underline)
  • This was deleted (strikethrough)

docs.title: Sub- and superscripts
docs.text:
• H2O
  • ATA

docs.title: LUT란?
docs.text: Look Up Table의 약어입니다. X-Ray image processing에서는 밝기 조정을 위해 보정을 할 때, sigmoid function 등을 쓰는데, 이 때 연산량을 줄여 속도를 높히기 위해서 사용합니다.
